metadata.name: UltraThink Knowledge Graph
metadata.description: Advanced knowledge graph system with entity extraction, relationship mapping, and reasoning capabilities

setup: The knowledge graph server automatically creates a persistent graph database
All entities and relationships are stored in .claude/mcp/data/knowledge-graph/
The graph persists across sessions for continuous knowledge building
No additional configuration required - works out of the box
usage: Use natural language to extract entities from code or documentation
Ask questions about relationships between components
Query the graph to understand complex architectural decisions
Track dependencies and their evolution over time
Synthesize knowledge across multiple files and contexts
examples: Extract entities from this authentication flow
Show me the relationships between these components
What are the dependencies of the payment processing system?
Track how the user authentication logic has evolved
Find all components that interact with the database layer

integration.process-todos: Knowledge graph enhances todo planning with architectural context
integration.spec-workflow: Specifications can reference existing knowledge graph entities
integration.advanced-git: Commit analysis can build knowledge graphs of code changes
integration.create-plan-todo: Plans can leverage relationship mapping for dependencies
integration.git-commit-docs-command: Documentation updates can update the knowledge graph
